ddls:
CREATE TABLE "data_collection_projects" (
  "dap_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection project */,
  "dap_code" TEXT /* Code assigned to the data collection project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data collection project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the data collection project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the data collection project */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Principal investigator of the data collection project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed, suspended) */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the project */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "total_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of cases reported in the project */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the project data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dap_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collection_projects_principal_investigator FOREIGN KEY ("principal_investigator") REFERENCES users ("user_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_indicators" (
  "aes_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health indicator */,
  "aes_code" TEXT /* Code assigned to the health indicator */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the health indicator */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the health indicator */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the health indicator (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the health indicator is currently being monitored */,
  "prevalence_rate" REAL /* Prevalence rate of the health indicator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aes_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_data" (
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic data entry */,
  "dap_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data collection project */,
  "aes_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health indicator */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the population (e.g., Female, Male) */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the population (e.g., 0-4, 12-17) */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "methodology_id" INTEGER /* ID of the methodology */,
  "person_years" INTEGER /* Person years of the population */,
  "incidence_rate" REAL /* Incidence rate of the health indicator */,
  "lower_confidence_limit" REAL /* Lower confidence limit for the incidence rate */,
  "upper_confidence_limit" REAL /* Upper confidence limit for the incidence rate */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Assessment of the data quality */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level for the incidence rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_age_group FOREIGN KEY ("age_group") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_aes_id FOREIGN KEY ("aes_id") REFERENCES health_indicators ("aes_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_sex FOREIGN KEY ("sex") REFERENCES sex ("sex_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_methodology_id FOREIGN KEY ("methodology_id") REFERENCES methodologies ("methodology_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_dap_id FOREIGN KEY ("dap_id") REFERENCES data_collection_projects ("dap_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the age group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the age group */,
  "lower_age_limit" INTEGER /* Lower age limit of the age group */,
  "upper_age_limit" INTEGER /* Upper age limit of the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sex" (
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sex category */,
  "sex_name" TEXT /* Name of the sex category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sex category */,
  "is_binary" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the sex category is binary or non-binary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "geographic_area" TEXT /* Geographic area of the region */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the region is a primary region for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL for accessing the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the data source was updated */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person for the data source */,
  "is_reliable" INTEGER /* Indicates the reliability of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "methodologies" (
  "methodology_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each methodology */,
  "methodology_name" TEXT /* Name of the methodology */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the methodology */,
  "is_validated" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the methodology has been validated */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date when the methodology was validated */,
  "validation_method" TEXT /* Method used for validation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("methodology_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dap_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data collection project being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data collection project */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data collection project was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event (in seconds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dap_id FOREIGN KEY ("dap_id") REFERENCES data_collection_projects ("dap_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "dap_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data collection project */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data collection project */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the version */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the version is the current version */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_dap_id FOREIGN KEY ("dap_id") REFERENCES data_collection_projects ("dap_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "dap_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data collection project */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "methodology_id" INTEGER /* ID of the methodology */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metadata */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Data quality assessment */,
  "last_reviewed" TEXT /* Last date the metadata was reviewed */,
  "reviewer" TEXT /* Name of the person who reviewed the metadata */,
  "is_approved" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the metadata has been approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_dap_id FOREIGN KEY ("dap_id") REFERENCES data_collection_projects ("dap_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_methodology_id FOREIGN KEY ("methodology_id") REFERENCES methodologies ("methodology_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)
